name: 06-04-v1-upgrade-persistence
title: V1 升级 - 持久化（Meal isar + Coach SharedPreferences）
description: 把 MealRepository 从内存改为 isar，把 CoachSessionRepository 从内存改为 SharedPreferences，保留 ChangeNotifier API 兼容现有 UI 与测试。
scope: pubspec.yaml, lib/features/nutrition, lib/features/coach, lib/main.dart, test, analysis_options.yaml
creator: sjzjams
notes: Meal 用 isar 3.1.0+1 + isar_flutter_libs；Coach 用 shared_preferences 2.3.3；保留 ChangeNotifier API 与无参构造以兼容现有测试；main.dart 启动序列 init isar + prefs → repository.init() → runApp。analysis_options.yaml 抑制 isar 3.x 生成代码的 experimental_member_use 警告。

verification.flutter_test: 18/18 passed (MealRepo x3, CoachSession x4, CoachMessageClassifier x5, Sprint5 x6)
